serverUrl.label: Server URL
serverUrl.desc: Your Bitwarden or Vaultwarden server URL. Leave blank for bitwarden.com.

password.label: Master Password
password.desc: Your Bitwarden master password. Stored locally and used to unlock the vault.

settings.hint: Install the Bitwarden CLI first: brew install bitwarden-cli. Then enter your credentials here. Saving will clear your cached session and require re-authentication.
